actions.name: Witchery
actions.description: Effect: While Gloomy Weather is active, the user is cured of 1 @Trait[major-affliction] or 1 @Trait[minor-affliction] at the end of their Activations, the oldest Afflictions being cured first. The user is considered Fairy Type for the effects of Gloomy Weather.
